heading: Consideration of performance as a member of the Joint Staff
label: 646 Consideration of performance as a member of the Joint Staff
text: The Secretary of Defense, in consultation with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, shall ensure that officer personnel policies of the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force concerning promotion, retention, and assignment give appropriate consideration to the performance of an officer as a member of the Joint Staff.
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “Marine Corps, and Space Force” for “and Marine Corps”.Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Amendments2021— substituted “Marine Corps, and Space Force” for “and Marine Corps”.Pub. L. 116–283
